title: Viners Kids Mermaid 4 Piece 18/0 Silver Stainless Steel Cutlery Set
features: MERMAZING | This kids cutlery set is all you need to make mealtime fun and exciting for your little one. With its cute, mermaid embossed contoured handles and smooth edges, it’s designed and produced with little hands and mouths in my mind

4 PIECE SET | This Viners cutlery set is perfect for children as they grow and learn to eat independently. The set includes one table knife, one table fork, one dessert spoon and one tea spoon, packaged in an underwater mermaid-themed gift box

STRONG AND SAFE | Made from mirror polished 18/0 stainless steel with children’s safety in mind, the long-lasting set is rust-resistant and dishwasher safe. The knife has a slight, yet safe serration letting children cut their own food without harm

CHILDREN'S CUTLERY SETS | Each set in the Children's range is unique and intended to make mealtimes frustration free and enjoyable. Find a four or three piece set to give as a gift or to suit your child’s needs for a truly once in a lifetime purchase

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cutlery that comes with up to 50-year guarantees
